common.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, signature

buildings.prompt: cyberpunk building facade, dark concrete, neon window grid, grungy, desaturated, seamless tileable, architectural detail, sci-fi

road_atlas.prompt: wet asphalt road surface, puddle reflections, tire marks, urban highway, desaturated, seamless tileable, top-down view

road_wet.prompt: rain-soaked asphalt, heavy puddles, neon reflections on wet surface, dark urban road, desaturated, seamless tileable

billboards.prompt: neon holographic advertisement, cyberpunk billboard, glitch art, high contrast, vivid colors, futuristic brand logo
billboards.note: Full-color, not desaturated. Each cell gets a unique seed.

ground.prompt: concrete sidewalk, cracked pavement, dark grey, small puddles, urban grime, seamless tileable, top-down view

windows.prompt: cyberpunk apartment windows at night, interior warm glow, blinds, silhouettes, desaturated, variety of lighting states

live_mode.prompt: cyberpunk neon city, rain reflections, cinematic, dark atmosphere
live_mode.note: Light stylization to preserve scene structure for real-time img2img
